title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: Google Cloud advocates that AI-native databases are essential for powering intelligent agents with enterprise data. The session covers AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, multimodal queries, and graph RAG as means to provide agents with high-fidelity interconnected context, alongside open standards like MCP and agentic IDEs for streamlined deployment.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session argues that AI-native databases are needed to connect intelligent agents to enterprise data. It covers AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, multimodal queries, and graph RAG as methods for giving agents high-fidelity, interconnected context. It also addresses open standards including the Model Context Protocol and agentic IDEs for streamlined deployment.
